title: Private Label Solutions
description: We specialize in private label tea production for global brands. Our experts handle everything from blending, design, packaging, and labeling to ensure your product stands out internationally.
features: Custom tea blends tailored to your market
Flexible packaging options — from luxury tins to eco pouches
Full branding support including label design and printing
End-to-end export documentation and logistics

title: Bulk Tea Export
description: Mist & Ember Exports supplies premium bulk tea to distributors, importers, and wholesalers around the world. Every shipment is inspected to meet the highest export standards of Sri Lanka.
features: Bulk quantities of Ceylon black, green, and herbal teas
Consistent grading and flavor profiling
International packaging compliance and traceability
Competitive global logistics network

title: Custom Blending & Formulation
description: Our master tea blenders craft unique blends that cater to diverse palates and preferences, combining the artistry of traditional Ceylon tea with modern innovation.
features: Expert blending and sensory evaluation
Infusions with herbs, fruits, or flowers
Flavor customization for target markets
Strict quality and food safety assurance (ISO 22000 & HACCP)

title: Packaging & Branding
description: We provide innovative packaging design and labeling solutions to complement your brand identity, maintaining both visual appeal and international compliance.
features: Eco-friendly and luxury packaging choices
Full-color printing and design customization
Compliance with FDA and EU labeling standards
In-house creative design and prepress services

title: Tea Sourcing & Selection
description: We handpick teas from Sri Lanka’s best plantations, maintaining relationships with ethical growers to guarantee freshness, quality, and sustainability.
features: Direct sourcing from top Ceylon estates
Sustainably farmed and ozone-friendly teas
Lot tracking and full transparency from leaf to cup
Procurement certified under Lion Logo and GMP standards

title: Sustainability & Community Development
description: Sustainability is central to our operations — from eco-friendly packaging to reforestation and community welfare initiatives that empower Sri Lankan tea growers.
features: Plastic-free, recyclable, and compostable materials
Energy-efficient production facilities
Reforestation and carbon offset programs
Community training and fair trade practices
